ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned to the user */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role assignment expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_mapping_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_mapping_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, data access) */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the activity (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Type of browser used for the activity */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system used for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preference_key" TEXT /* Key for the preference (e.g., language, theme) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence of the user */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of residence of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence of the user */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the user */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the user's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_contacts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the user */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the user */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the user */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the user */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the user */,
  "number_of_children" INTEGER /* Number of children of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_demographics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_segmentation" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the segment */,
  "segment_description" TEXT /* Description of the segment */,
  "segment_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for the segment (e.g., age range, location) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the segment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the segment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_segmentation_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_history" (
  "login_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "login_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged in */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user logged in */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the login */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Type of browser used for the login */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system used for the login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("login_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_reset" (
  "reset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password reset request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "reset_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the password reset request was made */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the password reset token expires */,
  "reset_token" TEXT /* Password reset token */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_reset_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, data access) */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_log_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
